'''yapovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphosure|xiphosure]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphosure|xiphosure]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yapovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæpeveth|yæpeveth]] || [[word:yæpevej|yæpevej]] || [[word:yæpevesh|yæpevesh]] || [[word:yæpeve|yæpeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yapopovoth|yapopovoth]] || [[word:yapopovoj|yapopovoj]] || [[word:yapopovosh|yapopovosh]] || [[word:yapopovo|yapopovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yapovoth|yapovoth]] || [[word:yapovoj|yapovoj]] || [[word:yapovosh|yapovosh]] || [[word:yapovo|yapovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yapofvoth|yapofvoth]] || [[word:yapofvoj|yapofvoj]] || [[word:yapofvosh|yapofvosh]] || [[word:yapofvof|yapofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yapovotho|yapovotho]] || [[word:yapovojo|yapovojo]] || [[word:yapovosho|yapovosho]] || [[word:yapovoko|yapovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yapovoth|yapovoth]] || [[word:yapovoj|yapovoj]] || [[word:yapovosh|yapovosh]] || [[word:yapovo|yapovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yapovothol|yapovothol]] || [[word:yapovojol|yapovojol]] || [[word:yapovoshol|yapovoshol]] || [[word:yapovokol|yapovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yapovothotho|yapovothotho]] || [[word:yapovojojo|yapovojojo]] || [[word:yapovoshosho|yapovoshosho]] || [[word:yapovoko|yapovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yapovothon|yapovothon]] || [[word:yapovojon|yapovojon]] || [[word:yapovoshon|yapovoshon]] || [[word:yapovokon|yapovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yapovothoro|yapovothoro]] || [[word:yapovojoro|yapovojoro]] || [[word:yapovoshoro|yapovoshoro]] || [[word:yapovokoro|yapovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
